title: Update module github.com/containers/common to v0.54.0
body:
[![Mend Renovate](https://app.renovatebot.com/images/banner.svg)](https://renovatebot.com)

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/containers/common](https://togithub.com/containers/common) | require | minor | `v0.53.0` -> `v0.54.0` |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/common (github.com/containers/common)</summary>

### [`v0.54.0`](https://togithub.com/containers/common/releases/tag/v0.54.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/containers/common/compare/v0.53.0...v0.54.0)

#### What's Changed

-   Cirrus: Resolve TODO WRT podman-plugins RPM by [@​cevich](https://togithub.com/cevich) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1433](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1433)
-   Bump v0.53.0 by [@​saschagrunert](https://togithub.com/saschagrunert) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1434](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1434)
